heading: Service of process
label: 60110 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6011036:4804., , .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. L. 101–510, title XVI, § 1604104 Stat. 1737The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
